languages.text: {n}Меровцы начинают скандировать ваше имя. Тихо, привыкнув быть неуслышанными на охоте, но этот шепот пронизывает вас насквозь. Странно, но Ведка не торопится присоединиться к общему порыву.{/n}
{n}The Merovians begin chanting your name. It is soft, the whisper of hunters accustomed to silence, yet it cuts to your core. Oddly, Vedka does not rush to join the collective surge.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Меровцы начинают скандировать ваше имя. Тихо, привыкнув быть неуслышанными на охоте, но этот шепот пронизывает вас насквозь. Странно, но Ведка не торопится присоединиться к общему порыву.{/n}

languages.text: {n}梅罗夫人开始低声呼唤你的名字。那声音很轻，像是习惯了沉默的猎手在低语，却直击你的内心深处。奇怪的是，薇德卡并没有立即加入这股集体的狂热。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Merovians begin chanting your name. It is soft, the whisper of hunters accustomed to silence, yet it cuts to your core. Oddly, Vedka does not rush to join the collective surge.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}梅罗夫人开始低声呼唤你的名字。那声音很轻，像是习惯了沉默的猎手在低语，却直击你的内心深处。奇怪的是，薇德卡并没有立即加入这股集体的狂热。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Merovlular, adını zikretmeye başlıyor. Sesleri yumuşak, sessizliğe alışmış avcıların fısıltısı gibi çıksa da iliklerine kadar işliyor. Tuhaf bir şekilde Vedka, bu kolektif coşkuya katılmakta aceleci davranmıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Merovians begin chanting your name. It is soft, the whisper of hunters accustomed to silence, yet it cuts to your core. Oddly, Vedka does not rush to join the collective surge.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Merovlular, adını zikretmeye başlıyor. Sesleri yumuşak, sessizliğe alışmış avcıların fısıltısı gibi çıksa da iliklerine kadar işliyor. Tuhaf bir şekilde Vedka, bu kolektif coşkuya katılmakta aceleci davranmıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les Meroviens, d'ordinaire si taciturnes, se mettent à scander votre nom d'une voix étouffée, ce qui ne manque pas de vous ragaillardir. Vedka, pour sa part, choisit de rester muette.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Merovians begin chanting your name. It is soft, the whisper of hunters accustomed to silence, yet it cuts to your core. Oddly, Vedka does not rush to join the collective surge.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Les Meroviens, d'ordinaire si taciturnes, se mettent à scander votre nom d'une voix étouffée, ce qui ne manque pas de vous ragaillardir. Vedka, pour sa part, choisit de rester muette.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Los merovianos empiezan a aclamar tu nombre. Lo hacen en voz baja, con el susurro de los cazadores acostumbrados al silencio, pero te llega al alma. Curiosamente, Vedka no se apresura en unirse al coro.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Merovians begin chanting your name. It is soft, the whisper of hunters accustomed to silence, yet it cuts to your core. Oddly, Vedka does not rush to join the collective surge.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Los merovianos empiezan a aclamar tu nombre. Lo hacen en voz baja, con el susurro de los cazadores acostumbrados al silencio, pero te llega al alma. Curiosamente, Vedka no se apresura en unirse al coro.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Merovianer skandieren deinen Namen. Es gleicht dem Flüstern von Jägern, die Stille gewohnt sind, trifft dich aber dennoch im Kern. Seltsamerweise stimmt Vedka nicht in die kollektive Woge ein.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Merovians begin chanting your name. It is soft, the whisper of hunters accustomed to silence, yet it cuts to your core. Oddly, Vedka does not rush to join the collective surge.{/n}

languages.text: {n}メロヴィアンがあなたの名前をささやく。静けさに慣れた狩人のささやきだが、あなたの心に響く。奇妙なことに、ヴェドカは群れに合流するのを急ぐことはなかった。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Merovians begin chanting your name. It is soft, the whisper of hunters accustomed to silence, yet it cuts to your core. Oddly, Vedka does not rush to join the collective surge.{/n}
